'''fochataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wading|wading]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wading|wading]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fochataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fochatithi|fochatithi]] || [[word:fochatiji|fochatiji]] || [[word:fochatishi|fochatishi]] || [[word:fochatiki|fochatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fochatuthuthu|fochatuthuthu]] || [[word:fochatujuju|fochatujuju]] || [[word:fochatushushu|fochatushushu]] || [[word:fochatukuku|fochatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fochatuthu|fochatuthu]] || [[word:fochatuju|fochatuju]] || [[word:fochatushu|fochatushu]] || [[word:fochatuku|fochatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fochatufthuf|fochatufthuf]] || [[word:fochatufjuf|fochatufjuf]] || [[word:fochatufshuf|fochatufshuf]] || [[word:fochatufkuf|fochatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fochatethe|fochatethe]] || [[word:fochateje|fochateje]] || [[word:fochateshe|fochateshe]] || [[word:fochateke|fochateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fochatothotho|fochatothotho]] || [[word:fochatojojo|fochatojojo]] || [[word:fochatoshosho|fochatoshosho]] || [[word:fochatokoko|fochatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fochatotho|fochatotho]] || [[word:fochatojo|fochatojo]] || [[word:fochatosho|fochatosho]] || [[word:fochatoko|fochatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fochatofthof|fochatofthof]] || [[word:fochatofjof|fochatofjof]] || [[word:fochatofshof|fochatofshof]] || [[word:fochatofkof|fochatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fochatïfthïf|fochatïfthïf]] || [[word:fochatïfjïf|fochatïfjïf]] || [[word:fochatïfshïf|fochatïfshïf]] || [[word:fochatïfkïf|fochatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fochatïfthïfthïf|fochatïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:fochatïfjïfjïf|fochatïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:fochatïfshïfshïf|fochatïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:fochatïfkïfkïf|fochatïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fochatïfthïf|fochatïfthïf]] || [[word:fochatïfjïf|fochatïfjïf]] || [[word:fochatïfshïf|fochatïfshïf]] || [[word:fochatïfkïf|fochatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fochatïfthïf|fochatïfthïf]] || [[word:fochatïfjïf|fochatïfjïf]] || [[word:fochatïfshïf|fochatïfshïf]] || [[word:fochatïfkïf|fochatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fochatæthæ|fochatæthæ]] || [[word:fochatæjæ|fochatæjæ]] || [[word:fochatæshæ|fochatæshæ]] || [[word:fochatækæ|fochatækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fochatathatha|fochatathatha]] || [[word:fochatajaja|fochatajaja]] || [[word:fochatashasha|fochatashasha]] || [[word:fochatakaka|fochatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fochatatha|fochatatha]] || [[word:fochataja|fochataja]] || [[word:fochatasha|fochatasha]] || [[word:fochataka|fochataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fochatafthaf|fochatafthaf]] || [[word:fochatafjaf|fochatafjaf]] || [[word:fochatafshaf|fochatafshaf]] || [[word:fochatafkaf|fochatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fochatasha|fochatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fochatshësha|fochatshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fochatrosha|fochatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fochatmusha|fochatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fochatyasha|fochatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofochatnkshësha|gofochatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofochatnkrosha|gofochatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofochatnkmusha|gofochatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofochatnkyasha|gofochatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fochachatasha|fochachatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fochachatshësha|fochachatshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fochachatrosha|fochachatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fochachatmusha|fochachatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fochachatyasha|fochachatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofochachatnkshësha|gofochachatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofochachatnkrosha|gofochachatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofochachatnkmusha|gofochachatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofochachatnkyasha|gofochachatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fechætasha|fechætasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fechætshësha|fechætshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fechætrosha|fechætrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fechætmusha|fechætmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fechætyasha|fechætyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofechætnkshësha|gofechætnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofechætnkrosha|gofechætnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofechætnkmusha|gofechætnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofechætnkyasha|gofechætnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fochfatasha|fochfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fochfatshësha|fochfatshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fochfatrosha|fochfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fochfatmusha|fochfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fochfatyasha|fochfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofochfatnkshësha|gofochfatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofochfatnkrosha|gofochfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofochfatnkmusha|gofochfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofochfatnkyasha|gofochfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
